user_query: The weather forecast shows heavy rain on Day 7. Which activities are outdoors that I might need to reschedule?

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Distillery District Walk

node_data.name: Distillery District Walk
node_data.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Explicitly described as an outdoor walking experience through cobblestone streets and a pedestrian village — likely to be impacted by heavy rain and may need rescheduling or moving indoors.
